name: Quick Italian Spaghetti
recipeIngredient: 2 1/4 oz Olives, ripe, drained and sliced (1 can)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown the ground beef and onions.
2. Add salt, pepper, sugar, Worcestershire sauce, and tomato sauce; cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Add olives and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
4. Spoon the sauce over cooked spaghetti.
5. Sprinkle with grated cheese and bacon bits if desired.
